donate.title: Support the project
donate.note: All payments are processed on external provider pages. No card data is handled by the extension.

welcome.title: Welcome to OPFS Studio
welcome.subtitle: OPFS Studio helps you inspect, edit and manage the Origin Private File System directly from your browser.

points.browse: Browse the OPFS of the current site in real time
points.editor: Edit files with Monaco editor (syntax highlighting & formatting)
points.watcher: Watch for external changes with conflict resolution
points.manage: Create, rename, upload and delete files and folders
